1101.name: 甘雨
1101.desc: "This press release is due tomorrow... I suppose I could work through the night and get it done."

1102.name: ディオナ
1102.desc: Dedicating 1% of her energy to mixing drinks, and 99% to... refusing to accept failure.

1103.name: ガイア
1103.desc: Specializes in awakening knightly virtues in others.

1104.name: 重雲
1104.desc: "Ugh, summer... Please pass us by in peace..."

1105.name: 神里綾華
1105.desc: As graceful as the frost drifting in the wind, as elegant as a heron perched in a courtyard.

1106.name: エウルア
1106.desc: It's but a game. I won't hold a grudge should luck happen to be on your side.

1107.name: 申鶴
1107.desc: The mortal realm briefly gracing, like a wisp of smoke vanishing.

1109.name: レイラ
1109.desc: As night falls, the stars swirl and the moon wanders amidst dreams.

1110.name: シャルロット
1110.desc: "Your credible source of the unbelievable truth!"

1112.name: フレミネ
1112.desc: Alone under the cold light of stars.

1113.name: ロサリア
1113.desc: "Light creates shadow, but shadow will not be controlled by light."

1114.name: シトラリ
1114.desc: The vivid night-wind flows, obsidian reflects the heart.

1115.name: エスコフィエ
1115.desc: Frosting and bake, the best taste to make.

1117.name: ミカ
1117.desc: With a feather plume as gold as maize, uncharted borders are depicted as clear as day.

1201.name: バーバラ
1201.desc: Ready to heal hearts and soothe souls at any time.

1202.name: 行秋
1202.desc: "Is it just me, or are the protagonists in novels nowadays all students of some private school or another..."

1203.name: モナ
1203.desc: Victory or defeat — it has all been written in the stars.

1204.name: タルタリヤ
1204.desc: Should this table be considered a battlefield, then may the strongest claim the win.

1205.name: 珊瑚宮心海
1205.desc: To survive hardship, you must prepare for hardship.

1206.name: 神里綾人
1206.desc: The divinely-blessed cypress sprouts new leaves.

1207.name: キャンディス
1207.desc: The crimson sand flows, an oath to defend.

1208.name: ニィロウ
1208.desc: Steps floating like lotus petals, emerging from an intoxicating dream.

1209.name: 夜蘭
1209.desc: The world is vast and infinite, the solitary one comes and goes as she pleases.

1210.name: ヌヴィレット
1210.desc: He who looks down on all that are haughty.

1211.name: フリーナ
1211.desc: Perpetual muse of chansons and rondeaux.

1215.name: ダリア
1215.desc: Let hymns of praise cast the winds as my ode.

1216.name: アイノ
1216.desc: Dreams spring to life with a clink-clank-clatter.

1301.name: ディルック
1301.desc: His heart is his greatest foe.

1302.name: 香菱
1302.desc: As a chef, she is practically omnipotent.

1303.name: ベネット
1303.desc: Once you know that you will certainly lose, then you must certainly know the way to win.

1304.name: アンバー
1304.desc: If you want to be a great player...\nFirst, you have to have the courage to sit down and play.

1305.name: 宵宮
1305.desc: Captain and Vanguard of Team Naganohara for the 11th Hanamizaka Street Invitational.

1306.name: クレー
1306.desc: Every card you draw may bring an "explosive surprise."

1308.name: 煙緋
1308.desc: One who fails to revise the classics is liable to fall foul of the law.

1309.name: ディシア
1309.desc: The eyes of a vulture, the spirit of a lion, an unbridled daughter of the desert.

1310.name: リネ
1310.desc: Those flowers in the mirror... who are they for?

1311.name: トーマ
1311.desc: A protector from abroad, loyal to the end.

1314.name: アルレッキーノ
1314.desc: Solitary Balemoon in a Sky of Fading Stars.

1315.name: マーヴィカ
1315.desc: The brightest, most splendid, most resplendent flame reborn.

1401.name: フィッシュル
1401.desc: "Oz, mine familiar, spread thine wings and weave for me a new fate in the gloom of this night!"\n"Mein Fräulein, you cannot expect me to fetch you a replacement card..."

1403.name: 刻晴
1403.desc: She can build decks heretofore not conceived and win battles in which victory is unthinkable.

1404.name: セノ
1404.desc: The card bears the General Mahamatra's ardent fondness, which reminds one of the scorching sun hanging above the desert.

1405.name: 北斗
1405.desc: "Remember this day, you almost won money from the Captain of the Crux."

1407.name: 雷電将軍
1407.desc: The tranquil thunder shall scatter this world most ephemeral.

1409.name: リサ
1409.desc: Pursuing the arcane mysteries of magic, and waiting quietly for an encounter with truth.

1411.name: 久岐忍
1411.desc: Master of all trades, deputy of the oni.

1412.name: クロリンデ
1412.desc: Vanquisher of Phantoms, Vigil of the Long Night

1413.name: セトス
1413.desc: A visitor from the sea of sand, profound in providence.

1414.name: イアンサ
1414.desc: Early to bed, early to rise. Avoid anything high in sugar or sodium.

1415.name: ヴァレサ
1415.desc: Steadfast in defense, unshakeable in offense.

1417.name: イネファ
1417.desc: White iron forged the body, crimson heart cast the soul.

1418.name: フリンズ
1418.desc: The Graven Light Leads Into Fathomless Night.

1501.name: スクロース
1501.desc: "You can't rate the strength of an as-yet untested deck!"

1502.name: ジン
1502.desc: Never believes that she has done well enough — not until final victory is hers, anyway.

1503.name: ウェンティ
1503.desc: "As the four seasons in turn shall say their piece, so the four winds too shall never cease. \n"Of course, to look at it differently, I am the one who should be credited here, and not they."\nCredits should be given where credits belong — if not for the bard who pens the song, then who shall ensure that these tales are passed on!?"

1504.name: 魈
1504.desc: The Vigilant Yaksha, the bane of all evil.

1505.name: 楓原万葉
1505.desc: Flowers and birds are a dear pleasure to one winding under the moonlight.

1507.name: 早柚
1507.desc: By your side without a trace, like a character from a dream.

1508.name: リネット
1508.desc: The firmament glimpsed in a reflected moon.

1511.name: チャスカ
1511.desc: Grace and power resound, feathered wings skybound.

1512.name: 藍硯
1512.desc: The brilliant swallow bears branches of joy to fill the home.

1513.name: 鹿野院平蔵
1513.desc: The heavenly robes, though seamlessly sewn, still fear the winds that with coldness are blown.

1514.name: 夢見月瑞希
1514.desc: Clouds of doubt depart, moonlight amidst dreams unveiled, to grace dreamers' hearts.

1601.name: 凝光
1601.desc: The greatest secret she keeps is that she keeps a great many of Liyue's secrets.

1602.name: ノエル
1602.desc: You can leave arranging the table to her — really, you can.

1603.name: 鍾離
1603.desc: A hidden gemstone can illuminate the whole earth, bright and unrivaled as a star.

1604.name: アルベド
1604.desc: Nigredo and calx, rubedo and citrinitas.

1606.name: ゴロー
1606.desc: The leader of the pack, leading the soldiers onward!

1607.name: 雲菫
1607.desc: Elegance on the stage, in decorous harmony.

1611.name: シロネン
1611.desc: The peaks resound, their golden veins gleaming.

1701.name: コレイ
1701.desc: "'Shouting the name of your card loudly will increase its power many-fold'... You've got to be kidding, right?"

1702.name: ティナリ
1702.desc: From a certain perspective, experience does not hold parity with wisdom.

1703.name: ナヒーダ
1703.desc: The panacea brings purity, and from the palace depths is spring renewed.

1705.name: 白朮
1705.desc: Living with many maladies, where will one find a cure?

1706.name: アルハイゼン
1706.desc: Learning, thinking, and taking care of business.

1707.name: 綺良々
1707.desc: On tails twain and padded feet, to all doors shall she deliver.

1708.name: カーヴェ
1708.desc: Knowledge of comprehension, benevolence, and aesthetics.

1709.name: キィニチ
1709.desc: Fulfiller of Commissions, Flame Bearer of the Canopy.

1710.name: エミリエ
1710.desc: Like fragrance fading, like mist dissipating.

1711.name: ラウマ
1711.desc: The mirrored moon fractures in the water.

2101.name: ファデュイ·氷蛍術師
2101.desc: And so long as the Mist Grass yet lingers, the Cryo Cicins will not abandon her.

2102.name: 「淑女」
2102.desc: The crimson dawn was reflected in her pupils, and at last, she unfolded her flaming wings and flew towards the light.\n"But that light is not the dawn, dear Rosalyne. That is a sea of flame that will consume everything."\nYet it mattered not, for she knew in her heart that the flames had devoured her long ago.

2103.name: 無相の氷
2103.desc: Code name: Daleth. A high-purity Cryo entity.\nIt doesn't seem all that good at ball sports...

2104.name: ファデュイ·氷霜の従者
2104.desc: Selected while still children, they can only become an "Operative" after many long years of training and teaching, after countless rounds have winnowed the field.

211011.name: 唯一の心
211011.desc: First the arrow strikes, and then it turns to frost.

211021.name: クールキャッツクロー
211021.desc: Shake and stir till its all evenly mixed... and there! Your refill's ready!

211041.name: 吐納真定
211041.desc: Steady breathing makes a steady heart.

211051.name: 寒空の宣命祝詞
211051.desc: The heron holds upon the ice on elegant wing.

211061.name: 戦意の表れ
211061.desc: Flood of frost will ensure that vengeance is mine.

211071.name: 忘玄
211071.desc: Transfigure, and let my will be embodied!

211101.name: 好奇を以て要義と為す

211151.name: 虹色パティスリーの茶話

212021.name: すだれの残香
212021.desc: His penmanship leaves quite the impression.

212031.name: 沈没の預言
212031.desc: "Hey! You should be playing that card!"\n"...Well, alright then, do what you want."

212051.name: 葛籠の中の玉櫛
212051.desc: Wisdom yet revealed from the casket parallels tides yet unfolded by the sea.

212061.name: 鏡華風姿
212061.desc: The courtyard remains fragrant even in the bitterest winter.

212071.name: 満溢の潮汐
212071.desc: Those who do not respect the regulations at cards...\nAre the enemy of all who love the game.

212081.name: 星天の花雨
212081.desc: Seven heavens, passing like a radiant stream, as though a dream drawn into being.

212111.name: 「僕の歌を聴きたまえ——さあ 愛の杯を掲げよう！」

212131.name: 休息は適度に取るのよ

212141.name: 夜域の賜物・逆巻く怒濤

212151.name: あらゆる喜びが君とあらんことを

213011.name: 流火焼灼
213011.desc: A simple way out of perilous situations.

213021.name: 交差する炎
213021.desc: This heat's just normal for a restaurant's standards!

213031.name: 冒険の憧れ
213031.desc: The best adventure is always yet to be.

213061.name: こんこんプレゼント
213061.desc: Let out a good laugh when you draw this card!

213071.name: 血のかまど
213071.desc: Director Hu needs a bit more firepower to settle certain unique affairs.

213081.name: 最終解釈権
213081.desc: "When it comes to cards... Well, anything is permissible, so long as the rules don't forbid it."

213111.name: 官吏の才知
213111.desc: "It looks like I'm responsible for another smile."

213131.name: 尖兵協同戦術
213131.desc: "The Special Security and Surveillance Patrol deals with a whole host of heinous crimes and dangerous criminals. As such, the methods we employ to enforce the law can be a bit on the... harsher side."

213141.name: あらゆる怨みと借りは私が清算しよう…

214011.name: 星喰いの鴉
214011.desc: "The instant in which Ozvaldo Hrafnavins shows his great might."

214021.name: 覚醒
214021.desc: The hunt is about to begin.

214031.name: 抵天の雷罰
214031.desc: As long as you're not actually cheating, this is just the name of a card.

214051.name: 満天の霹靂
214051.desc: Rumbling thunder goes well with lightning storms!

214061.name: 我界
214061.desc: "With this unity between my mind, arrow, and bow, any enemy will be struck down!"

214091.name: パルスの魔女
214091.desc: As a Librarian who has read through tens of thousands of volumes, of course it's trivial for me to remember how to win...

214101.name: 益をとって損を補う
214101.desc: "First raise the price by 30%, then sell at a 20% discount!"

214151.name: 正義のヒーローの凱旋

215011.name: 混元熵増論
215011.desc: The wild winds gather — and amidst the chaos, victory.

215041.name: 降魔·護法夜叉
215041.desc: Evil shall be dispersed, and the vile will be scattered.

215051.name: 風物の詩吟
215051.desc: There is something elegant about this match.\nIf nothing else, both sides may concede defeat without regrets.

215071.name: 新しいサボり方
215071.desc: "I should have just stayed in bed today."

216021.name: 支援はお任せください
216021.desc: A stout heart is the sternest armor.

216031.name: 贅沢な食饌
216031.desc: The vastness of rivers flows endless, perpetual upon the tapestry of eons.

216041.name: 聖なる堕落
216041.desc: "The process of confirming the strategy for a duel also requires meticulous calculations..."

216051.name: 荒瀧第一
216051.desc: Whatever you do, remember to ride the momentum.

216061.name: 犬瞬·疾きこと風の如く

216101.name: 夜域の賜物・団結の炉心

217011.name: フライリーフワインダー
217011.desc: Never underestimate Collei, and never underestimate her cat.

217021.name: 深き眼識
217021.desc: Mistakes are part of learning... However, these mistakes should be corrected upon being discovered.

217051.name: 地に在りて形を成す
217051.desc: "If you can perceive the heavens and the earth, defend against malignant auras with the flow of qi, and keep your mind clear, surely nothing can hinder you."

217061.name: ストラクタレーション

217091.name: 夜域の賜物・すべてに対価を

217111.name: 「唇よ歌を紡ぎて 詩を織りなせ」

2201.name: 純水精霊·ローデシア
2201.desc: "As long as rain falls and rivers flow... water will exist forever... "

2202.name: ファデュイ·ミラーメイデン
2202.desc: All secrets shall be concealed within the mirror of glaring brightness...

2203.name: アビスの使徒·激流
2203.desc: The world shall be severed, and all shall be obliterated.

2204.name: 呑星の鯨
2204.desc: In the most fantastical of fables, or perhaps in the most rabid of ravings, the true stars in the depths of cosmos are just as full of life as on Teyvat, while the universe itself is akin to an ocean.\nPerhaps the universe's infiltration of Teyvat has never ceased, and perhaps the drawing of borders around this world was the work of a higher will, meant to protect it.

2205.name: ヒルチャールレンジャー·水
2205.desc: Hilichurl wanderers unaffiliated with any specific tribe. They can often be found roving the wilds as if in voluntary exile.

2206.name: 水形タルパ
2206.desc: A human-shaped monster formed from the agglomeration of countless drops of water.

2207.name: 聖骸ツノワニ
2207.desc: A reptile that has mutated after feeding from greater lifeforms, controlling the ever-changing flow of water.

221011.name: 氷蛍寒光
221011.desc: More Mist Grass means more friendly Cryo Cicins.\n...But what happens when the Mist Grass is used up?\nPerhaps she never considered this.

221031.name: 厳霜のプリズム
221031.desc: Despite its highly stable form and almost machine-like movements, it must still meticulously defend its weak spot...

222011.name: 百川奔流
222011.desc: The racing waters are a display of love toward a deceased deity.

222021.name: 鏡の檻
222021.desc: "Mirror, mirror, in my hand, where do our foes lurk in this land?"

222041.name: 光無き鯨の呑噬
222041.desc: Phosphorescent creatures float all about the dark, moonless seas of dreams — perhaps they are as food for some titanic leviathan.

222061.name: 合流
222061.desc: "Countless wills dissolved in the water, which, like the universe, was full of souls that wished to be born."

222071.name: 亡水溢流
222071.desc: "To devour, to merge, to seek yet another immortal carcass — the Consecrated Beasts enact this evolution in ceaseless repetition. Little do they know that the end of this cycle may never come..."

223011.name: 目には目を
223011.desc: Remember this for so long as you live: You know who it is you owe, and you know when you must pay.

223021.name: 再び燃え盛る残火
223021.desc: The path toward sowing grace is not assured to be one free of obstructions.

223041.name: 熔炎鉄甲
223041.desc: "Imagine this world: All of humanity has been purged from Teyvat, and the ever-growing Emperor of Fire and Iron eventually wears the Palais Mermonia upon its body like a luxurious coat of white stone."

223051.name: 燃える憤怒
223051.desc: "Trapped perpetually in the final day of its existence by this pitch-black gospel, its boundless fury has consumed all reason. Now, what remains is its unrelenting lust for battle, burning on without end."

223061.name: 「焔の主の祝福」
223061.desc: "However, judging from his current title of 'Tyrant,' that story did not have a happy ending..."

224011.name: エネルギー吸収プリズム
224011.desc: "Here's our chance!"\n"Hey, it's on our side!"

224021.name: 悲嘆号泣
224021.desc: That which drives the Thunder Manifestation is a much more primal fury...

224031.name: パール固化
224031.desc: Xenomare Pearl, Fontemer Hoarthunder... The seahorse-shaped phantasmal beast, though a solitary king, has neither an opulent court nor the ruins of one. What it does have, however, is the majesty and might to send other Fontemer Aberrants skittering away from it in terror...

224041.name: 雷蛍浮光
224041.desc: "Are you... here to play with me?"

224051.name: 死雷凝集
224051.desc: Lifeforms are governed by the laws of evolution, Consecrated Beasts exploited these rules by being fortunate enough to discover a long-dead carcass of a greater being before any of their competition ever did.

224061.name: 襲雷閃光
224061.desc: "Their violent lightning strikes the hearts of unbelievers with dark wisdom, warped by the shadowy depths of an eternal night, its violet glow proclaiming the existence of a great power that corrodes human intellect."

225011.name: からくり神通
225011.desc: That unerring strike has been delivered countless times.

225021.name: 破壊の風渦
225021.desc: But never forget that dust can be wiped away, and the power of doubt and poison can be shattered.

225031.name: 死風咆哮
225031.desc: Though now imbued with the power of elemental manipulation, the Consecrated Beasts themselves still cannot fully digest the pieces of flesh they devoured from immortal carcasses. Instead, the pieces slowly fused with the beasts themselves, changing them...

226011.name: 鋳直し：岩兜
226011.desc: An enduring force flows through that craggy form.

226022.name: 朝夕の千引
226022.desc: "Today is the day... We settle this now!"

226031.name: 異獣の侵食
226031.desc: "The Wolflord has no name, for it was but one of "Gold"'s unintentional creations, and that is precisely why it is obsessed with invading worlds that do not belong to it and making a name for itself."

226041.name: 「かつて、黒水の奔流を遮った磐石の如く…」
226041.desc: "And in the realm's darkest hour, those who had to protect their homeland had little room to be fussy anyway."

226051.name: グラビティフィールド
226051.desc: According to the original design intentions, this was the first step in a plan to turn Fontaine into a city in the sky, so never again would the people have to worry about the waves that once swept over the land. Even if all seven nations were to be swallowed by the deeps, the elegant Court of Fontaine would float above it all, just like Celestia. Even the secrets of the universe would no longer seem so distant.

227011.name: 胞子増殖
227011.desc: Few can safely traverse the traps laid by the Fungus with intelligence above that of the average living being.

227021.name: 幾千万の子孫
227021.desc: Apep once walked through an ocean of fragrant grass, gigantic trees, and unimaginably long vines like a fish with its many offspring swimming through the sea. Finally, the grass, trees, and vines withered and turned to dust, while countless beings as minute as grains of gravel built a fragile kingdom upon Apep's land.\nApep and its offspring made the sea of sand rage like boiling water and swept houses down as if they were falling leaves. Until the day when the new Lord of Sand reconciled with the king who lost their homeland, the dunes under the sun belonged to humanity, while the dragon's oasis remained in the hearts of the dragons.\nApep shared the knowledge of evolution with its many offspring, because spreading knowledge ensures dissemination while the stagnation of hoarded wisdom courted only decay. Till the day the promise between it and the Lord of Sand was finally attained, with ultimate wisdom claimed. Henceforth, it reaped only sights of oblivion, of an endless calamity...

227031.name: とぐろ巻く霊蛇の威嚇
227031.desc: "...Even though all such gods and kings have now faded into the flowing sands, the memory of dance yet persists in the desert-dwellers' veins."

227041.name: 万物を喰らう者
227041.desc: "Some tribe members believe that it has its current body shape because it has a unique physique, like the Qucusaur Tyrant... Though in fact, this is simply because it's lived for so long, and eaten way, WAY too much."

227051.name: 天を覆う枯れ草
227051.desc: "Human beings' baits and the remains of immortal beings are essentially deliberate or unintentional traps. The price of coveting the gift of the strongest is much more painful than being locked in a cage."

2301.name: ファデュイ·デットエージェント·炎
2301.desc: "There is no running from your debt, be you living or otherwise."

2302.name: アビスの詠唱者·淵炎
2302.desc: From chapters of canon revealed come much heeded admonishments.

2303.name: エルマイト旅団·サンドロアマスター
2303.desc: Those who still remember will never betray the spirit of the sands yet flowing through their veins.

2304.name: 鉄甲熔炎帝王
2304.desc: One of the two sovereigns who once stood at the apex of the aberrant species of the Fontemer. An Armored Crab that has avoided predation, and has constantly partaken in hunting and eating. Its imperial title is made half in awe, and half in jest.

2305.name: 蝕まれし源焔の主
2305.desc: A monster of the void, known as both the Reaper of the Abyss and "Gosoythoth." It is able to corrupt memories contained within the Ley Lines, congealing them into tangible forces of catastrophic portent.

2306.name: 暴君・金焔のクク竜
2306.desc: A Qucusaurus whose body has attained a supernatural form due to enduring forces that the bodies of modern Saurians cannot control.

2401.name: 無相の雷
2401.desc: Code name: Aleph. A high-purity Electro entity.\nEven if you win at rock-paper-scissors, Aleph is not one to admit defeat.

2402.name: 雷音権現
2402.desc: As long as the grudges of the land do not fade, so will the roaring thunder persist.

2403.name: 千年真珠の海駿
2403.desc: One of the two sovereigns standing at the apex of the Fontemer Aberrants. Poets and authors view it as a proud and noble creature, thus bestowing it with its high-flown title.

2404.name: ファデュイ·雷蛍術師
2404.desc: ...Just as the scent of Mist Grass intoxicates the Electro Cicins, so too does the sadistic mage hanker after the pleasure of toying with her foe...

2405.name: 聖骸サソリ
2405.desc: A poisonous scorpion that became twisted and warped by eating some great being. It now commands perilous lightning.

2406.name: アビスの詠唱者・紫電
2406.desc: Praise be unto the Abyss, the Wisdom of Corrosion.

2501.name: 魔偶剣鬼
2501.desc: Even today, it still patrols the place where fate was severed.

2502.name: トワリン
2502.desc: "How wonderful it would have been if you were as I, witnessing your noble, beautiful form as you soared through the blue sky."\n"Then you would know that this sky and this earth are both things worth fighting for."

2503.name: 聖骸トビヘビ
2503.desc: A flying serpent that became twisted and warped by eating some great being. Now, it commands the fearsome winds.

2601.name: ヒルチャール·岩兜の王
2601.desc: Go around — the way ahead is the realm of the "king."

2602.name: 若陀龍王
2602.desc: The faint rattling of this dragon lord's shackles and his deep, angry growl echo through the bowels of the mountains like memories of a bygone era.

2603.name: 黄金王獣
2603.desc: A twisted beast from another world. This creature is the ruler of the Riftwolves, and wields the power to command them to dissolve space itself.

2604.name: 黒蛇騎士・砕岩の斧
2604.desc: A guard of some standing in the court, sundering the foes of the nation's rulers using a sword art known as "Truthseeker."

2605.name: 実験用フィールド生成装置
2605.desc: A product of the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering that has gone out of control due to an accident. It has the ability to "counteract" the effects of gravity.

2701.name: マッシュラプトル
2701.desc: If you keep silent and listen closely, you can hear the sound of the ruler of the Shroom-Kin inspecting its territory...

2702.name: アペプのオアシス守護者
2702.desc: Apep found itself swallowed alone amidst the scenery of the catastrophe. All the people, gods, dragons, beasts, birds, and fish. All memories, wisdom, words, and hatred were ground into colorless dust, and the last of the moonlight burned away into a rain of pale fire, falling on the barren land.\n...\nApep once deemed the bottom of the sea of sand to be its grave, not the palace of a dispossessed king. The poison of "wisdom" would soon free Apep from the hatred and anger festering within it over countless moons. Apep had grown weary of the colorless apocalypse. Then, finally, the young god and the golden Traveler let it recall once again, even though the verdant land it once ruled had been reduced to this gilded wasteland, even though Apep and its many offspring had grown twisted and wretched to secure their continued survival therein, Apep still treasured the sight and scenes of the oasis sparkling in its heart.

2703.name: エルマイト旅団・フローラルリングダンサー
2703.desc: "The children of the desert have a rich tradition of song and dance. Originally used to praise and serve the gods, the crafts were later adapted for battle and the seduction of kings."

2704.name: 山の王・貪食のユムカ竜
2704.desc: A mighty Yumkasaurus that has survived since ancient times and seen countless battles.

2705.name: 聖骸牙獣
2705.desc: A predator that has mutated after feeding from greater lifeforms. It now wields the power of frenzied vines.

311101.name: 魔導緒論
311101.desc: The 12th edition of the Magic Guide.\nIt contains a great detail of errors, but nonetheless remains the most authoritative guide to magic in existence.

311102.name: 祭礼の断片
311102.desc: A weathered musical score, the content of which is no longer legible.

311103.name: 天空の巻
311103.desc: Its full name is the "An atlas of the winds and clouds."\nThis text records the winds and clouds of the northern lands' skies in poetic and archival forms.

311104.name: 千夜に浮かぶ夢
311104.desc: "There is an appointed time for all things to live and die, just like the ceaseless cycles of night and dawn."\n"May the stories within this lamp grant you dreams worth looking forward to."

311105.name: 満悦の実
311105.desc: "Even the most bitter of stories contain courage and strength... The story of the good Golden Nara's adventures with us will help good Nara defend the forest."

311106.name: 四風原典
311106.desc: "When flowers bloom, when leaves sway, that is me who sings the songs of freedom, of the winds."

311107.name: トゥライトゥーラの記憶
311107.desc: "In the end, all people, good or evil, will find themselves ground beneath the wheels of fate, and the sapphire city would fade, dissipating like tears beneath the scorching sun."

311108.name: 久遠流転の大典
311108.desc: "...For if the harbinger of the apocalypse would indeed one day arrive, the flood would wash everything away."\n"And we would fight with both duty and joy in our hearts, just as the goddess had found empathy for us in hers."

311109.name: 凛流の監視者
311109.desc: "The overseer made of precision machinery rumbles as it observes the monetary flow of the tiny nation,\nTirelessly recording the movement of every amount of money, the savings and spending of all,\nThe changes in value, and the number of times each piece of currency is circulated over a specific period."

311110.name: 純水流華
311110.desc: "...This heart of mine, which beats as though it were ensconced in a vessel of flesh and blood, has already been stained with the same sin on this journey. This heart of mine, so tortured by the pain of regret — where could it ever hope to find peace?"

311111.name: 不滅の月華
311111.desc: "Even if the storm clouds should gather, and even if the violet lightning's ferocity be perilous and unpredictable.\nThe silver moon of Watatsumi shall still pierce through the clouds and scatter forth its light."

311112.name: 祭星者の眺め
311112.desc: "I shall watch over you always, O hero solely mine, bound to your shoulder always, like a silken string..."\n"Until our souls are entwined eternally in profoundest peace, where even death shall not do us part."

311201.name: 鴉羽の弓
311201.desc: Ravens are known to be the ferrymen of the dead. As such, hunters would decorate their bows' limbs with feathers which forebode the imminent death of their targets.

311202.name: 祭礼の弓
311202.desc: A ceremonial hunting bow that has seen the passage of many years. The trinkets on it are still visible.

311203.name: 天空の翼
311203.desc: The sound of this sky-piercing lyre firing is music to the Anemo Archon's ears.

311204.name: アモスの弓
311204.desc: "I dreamt of ocean waves and sand, of lush forests and land."\n"I dreamt of boars playing in berry bushes, of a towering spire."

311205.name: 終焉を嘆く詩
311205.desc: "...But no wind in any season on earth"\n"Shall have you gaze upon me again."

311206.name: 王の近侍
311206.desc: A weapon you obtained from an Aranara tale. It has taken on the shape of a bow.\n"Remember, this whole world is but a dream of the forest... Please pass on the forest's language and the responsibility of protecting the King's land to future successors."

311207.name: 竭沢
311207.desc:
"...The fish that once shot forth like an arrow across a huge lake on the plateau,
That would stretch out as straight as a spear, cruising back and forth between the sacred sites,
Would see its stream seep into the sand, its lake shrink into a puddle,
Till at last, it wound up curled in a little plash, at the mercy of passing pilgrims."

311208.name: 若水
311208.desc: "It is in defense of the purity of the source that water's gentleness can also become as blade and bow.\nConspiracy and coded language are interwoven with ease under the pale blue full moon — this is the wisdom of water's shape."

311209.name: 羅網の針
311209.desc: "There are few truly inescapable traps in this world, for even the densest web can be threaded with a needle.\nGlimmers of hope can be found between the hooks and cages of even a trap set to kill.\nJust as no one can fully lock away their heart, even the most cautious defenses must eventually falter."

311301.name: 白鉄の大剣
311301.desc: A lightweight greatsword made of white iron with a silver sheen.

311302.name: 祭礼の大剣
311302.desc: This greatsword has seen the passage of many years, and was once owned by a clan of brave and gifted warriors who fought hard and died young.

311303.name: 狼の末路
311303.desc: A longsword said to have been used by the knight of the north wind. It became endowed with legendary power owing to his friendship with the wolves.

311304.name: 天空の傲
311304.desc: This is a tale of sky-shaking valor. Bearing the will to defend all, let the wind dragon bestow wrath upon its vile nemesis.

311305.name: 鐘の剣
311305.desc: There once was a traitor who brandished a blade against his fallen clan.\nThough this individual was eventually cast out from his clan, rumor has it that his organization continued their chosen duties.\nLegend claims that even the Wolf Pup Rostam might have been involved...

311306.name: 葦海の標
311306.desc: "On top of the ruins of the pool where the regalia of past executions of offenders was excavated, those who had lost the dream of the desert, yet were unwilling to give up their vast sea of sand, gathered.\nIn the name of the Reed Sea that never existed, they connected with the dream that was promised to them..."

311307.name: 森林のレガリア
311307.desc: "...Then the current changed and the moon's reflection was scattered. Much has changed, and yet, much will now remain unchanged forevermore.\nBut even if you, like me, have never met a king, you would still get the impression that Tiger was a noble and powerful king of the forest."

311308.name: 「スーパーアルティメット覇王魔剣」
311308.desc: "... Uh, what? A cheap cardboard claymore? No, no, no, this is... Well, it's... the Ultimate Overlord's Mega Magic Sword, once used to triumph over the Crab Emperor!"\nAfter some discussion, the Melusines reached a consensus. This, the mightiest sword in Merusea Village, that had shone so illustriously in the shadowed mists of the past, should be given to an unparalleled hero, as a memorial to their friendship.

311309.name: 携帯型チェーンソー
311309.desc: "A chainsaw favored by workers of the past to cut through keels and pipes... Grab the handle tightly with both hands, and even hard steel shall split before you."

311310.name: 知恵の溶炎
311310.desc: "Let the memories of the past accompany you on your journey, in place of forebears who now lack the strength to..."\n"The past flows through the blood into each new generation, like an unquenchable fire passed down through rituals that never cease to burn."

311401.name: 白纓槍
311401.desc: A standard-issue weapon of the Millelith soldiers. It has a sturdy shaft and sharp spearhead. It's a reliable weapon.

311402.name: 千岩長槍
311402.desc: These spears were forged from the rocks of the Guyun Stone Forest, and were favored by the Millelith of old. Their hardness knows no equal.

311403.name: 天空の脊
311403.desc: A spear that can hold up the skies. It was this unshakable resolve that sustained the wind dragon through its mortal battle against its vile nemesis.

311404.name: 破天の槍
311404.desc: Folklore spoke of a vast shadow entrenched in the depths of the ocean capable of swallowing passing warships...\nAt tale's end, they believe that Rex Lapis once wielded a spear that pierced the rainbow, pinning the churning vortex that had once terrorized the oceans in the center of the deep sea.

311405.name: 草薙の稲光
311405.desc: The naginata was a lethal weapon by which scattered dross might be cut away.\nAnd the one who wielded that naginata was one who guarded the path to eternity.

311406.name: ムーンピアサー
311406.desc: "Children fascinated by the moon will weep when they gaze upon it, for the moon has turned into fine sand and entered their eyes. In many stories, no tears are shed in vain."

311407.name: 和璞鳶
311407.desc: "The stone bird took to the unbound skies once forged. Into the heart of the ocean it dove, into the battlefield with the behemoth and the whale. Into the depths of the sea the behemoth sank, there to stay forever. Released from its thundering roars were the people of Liyue."

311408.name: 正義の報酬
311408.desc: "That is how the world ought to operate, and how righteousness should be."\n"But when it comes to "how things ought to be," it is always fiendishly difficult to get ideal results."

311409.name: プロスペクタードリル
311409.desc: "The tool's piercing and cutting power were unmatched.\nSince it could pierce through even rocks like a hot knife through butter,\nit made quick work out of penetrating through even softer materials."

311501.name: 旅道の剣
311501.desc: A handy steel sword that contains all manner of useful items in its sheath.

311502.name: 祭礼の剣
311502.desc: This blade was just a prop before its blade was sharpened by the passage of time.

311503.name: 風鷹剣
311503.desc: This sword was ever at the hip of the warrior from another land, and it bore witness to her achievement in spreading justice and freedom across Mondstadt.

311504.name: 天空の刃
311504.desc: The sky-piercing fang. With nemesis vanquished, the wind dragon fell into a deep slumber.\nCenturies passed, and Dvalin's sacrifice was all but forgotten by Mondstadt.\nA prayer, this sword is. May Dvalin's name be restored.

311505.name: 西風剣
311505.desc: "Legend has it that the knight that bore the title of Wolf Pup could cleave even raindrops with his blade, and the gales spurred by his blows were strong enough to snap roses.\nThough none could match the heights of the Wolf Pup's prowess, the knights bear his oath of protection yet, his legacy lasting even to the present."

311506.name: 萃光の裁葉
311506.desc: "If you believe that he yet has the potential to reclaim his honor in the maze, then guide him to break off the pale branch...\nOnly then can the bright moon and the newborn stars grant him pure wisdom and help him shed his bitter memories and desires."

311507.name: 原木刀
311507.desc: "...Even so, your stories and mine will leave their traces in the depths of the desert, like the footprints of the Forest Kind."\n"So shall past friendships peacefully sleep, like an Aranara transformed into a seed."

311508.name: 静水流転の輝き
311508.desc:
"...On a morning clear as the light reflected on the lake, the Mistress of Many Waters was moved by that pained plea.
And so the kindly goddess granted her wish and gave her blessing to the journey ahead.
For the Mistress of Many Waters knew that a fair judgment was the greatest leniency one could give a selfless soul.
And perhaps that is why that noble verdict dyed fate in its colors."

311509.name: 船渠剣
311509.desc: "Although such blades were not owned by their wielders, those who depended on them saw them as extensions of their limbs, and so they often inscribed their names onto the hilts and blades to avoid losing them. The name inscribed on this blade belongs to one of Poisson's former mayors."

312001.name: 冒険者のバンダナ
312001.desc: "All the secrets of the stars and the abyss await discovery by mere mortals."

312002.name: 幸運の冠
312002.desc: "One who is favored by fortune can even find priceless treasures in the most deadly of traps."

312003.name: 医者の方巾
312003.desc: "Come sun or rain, nothing could stay the traveling doctor's steps."

312004.name: 博徒のピアス
312004.desc: "In games where one gambles with life and death, remaining calm and composed is key to increasing one's odds of victory."

312005.name: 教官の帽子
312005.desc: "I don't have the talent to command an army as its general, nor am I qualified for anything beyond being a soldier."\n"All I can do is to be a strict instructor to these children, so that they might survive on the battlefield a bit longer."

312006.name: 亡命者の冠
312006.desc: "Woe to thee, oh great hall with silver piled high! Why is your crown drenched in blood?"

312007.name: 華飾の兜
312007.desc: "Thirteen years went by like a dream. The scarlet snow flies through the shadowed pass like smoke. You have now gone afar."

312008.name: 絶縁の旗印
312008.desc: Thirteen years went by like a dream.\nThe scarlet snow flies through the shadowed pass like smoke.\nYou have now gone afar.

312009.name: 将帥の兜
312009.desc: "The last drop of blood had soaked into the battlefield, and the glazed sands shone gloriously once more."

312010.name: 千岩牢固
312010.desc: "...To ensure that the afflicted civilians could safely escape, and to maintain their honor in the eyes of the Lord of Geo,\nThe helmet-clad troops of the front line took the lead, pointing their spears towards the Abyss and charging into battle."

312011.name: 虺雷の姿
312011.desc: "...Tianqiu once played host to a Yaksha, four-armed and mighty."\n"He came to The Chasm from afar, to the praises of the tribes."

312012.name: 辰砂往生録
312012.desc: "Do you not hear? The drums die in the north wind, the hero sinks into the vortex."\n"Have you not seen? The Yaksha's battle for the dawn — alas for a life so spent."

312013.name: 無常の面
312013.desc: Even a faint smile could not conceal her sorrow.\nThough this is a festive day, it seems more like a farewell...

312014.name: 追憶のしめ縄
312014.desc: "...Losing one's memory is no different from losing one's life. It is like death amidst darkness eternal."\n"Life is full of uncertainty. Love is fleeting, and even lasting memories may be lost..."

312015.name: 海祇の冠
312015.desc: "The people of the sea sing that these crowns of pearls and coral will never be stained by any dirt."

312016.name: 海染硨磲
312016.desc: "Bringing hopes and memories from the depths, permeating long-lost civilizations and history, these graceful and exquisite crowns slide into the forgotten rifts with their owners."

312017.name: 砂王の投影
312017.desc: "Once, the wise mortal king and the clergy received divine oracles personally, and they were the masters of the land."\n"Today, those who rule as proxies in the oases are the shadows of the gods."

312018.name: 金メッキの夢
312018.desc: "Some time later, absurd decisions would be issued alongside illusory madness, using lovely expectations as bait to lead the people towards a bitter end."

312019.name: 浮流の対玉
312019.desc: "...And the stone that had been lost to the waters may have been a lesser jade, or perhaps just a simple cup. Some even say that the "jade" in the tale is in fact an analogy for a beautiful person."

312020.name: 来歆の余響
312020.desc: "The wide river of a legend will oft produce many tributaries. One of these goes like this: This gem was once jade from a sacred mountain, carved into its current shape only by the hand of Rex Lapis himself."

312021.name: 霊光明滅の心
312021.desc: "If the darkness of death did not threaten it, no life would have any importance.\nIf the waves of forgetfulness did not surge against them, there would be no histories worth recording..."

312022.name: 花海甘露の光
312022.desc: "Many spirits dwell in the sea, and they carry the wishes of grass, tree, and dew, cleansing all filth.\nMany spirits dwell in the sea, and they sing of the three mothers — of verdure, of sweet dew, and of fresh flowers."

312023.name: 老兵の容貌
312023.desc: "Yet even though the scars can be covered, the wounds laid on one's heart will not disappear."

312024.name: ファントムハンター
312024.desc:
"'Pursue the phantoms in the dark, expel them all, and hunt them down.'
Such is the origin of the name 'Marechaussee Hunter,'
Credited to one Cassiodor, who would be elevated to the revered title of 'Golden Hunter,'
But who saw the name as a humiliation."

312025.name: 黄金の劇団の褒賞
312025.desc: "When the great golden symphony plays once more, the Golden Troupe will receive the rightful rewards owed to the true and loyal."\n"When the perfect order separates humanity into master and servant, prosperity and beauty shall make the kingdom glorious once more..."

312026.name: 黄金の劇団
312026.desc: "Abide until that day... Abide until that day...\nWhen every member of the Golden Troupe shall win the whole future as their prize."

312027.name: 紫晶の花冠
312027.desc: "In honor of the eternal oasis and the flourishing Padisarahs, the Lord of Flowers wore an amethyst crown."

312028.name: 楽園の絶花
312028.desc: "But 'eternity' is ultimately a lie. Intoxication and love could only grind memories down to broken dreams."

312029.name: 剣闘士の凱旋
312029.desc: "Only in moments of victory could the slave have a taste of what it felt like to be a master. But the cost of this vain aspiration was for the faint glow of freedom to be shrouded by darkness.\nOn the day of his triumph, the gladiator finally caught a glimpse of the world outside his cell. He was a step closer to freedom."

312030.name: 指揮者のハット
312030.desc: "The members then turned the notes into words and recorded their journey in a book.\nThis book, The Widsith as they called it, was still held tightly in the conductor's hands even after his death."

312031.name: 少女の儚き顔
312031.desc: "...As time passed, fewer and fewer courters visited her with flowers. What did it matter? For her, time had already stopped long ago on that fateful day."

312032.name: 呪戦士の羽面
312032.desc: "...Nonetheless, someone had to shoulder the responsibility, and the strong naturally should bear a greater burden.\nIt was only after witnessing true war that he first felt the weight of destiny."

312033.name: 諸聖の栄冠
312033.desc: "Under the sun's radiance did the tribes make a pact of armistice, and thus did the sacred ones of the night realm lay their arguments aside and offer him the crown."

312034.name: 灰燼の都に立つ英雄の絵巻
312034.desc: "The gates of hell are stained red by the flowing blood of the brave. Let me offer my blood, and leave the key to those gates with my child."

312035.name: 主なき冠
312035.desc: "And with those things bearing his name, she walked into the dark night, never to return."

312036.name: 異想が枯れ落ちる円舞
312036.desc: "In the end, all dreams shall merge into one, bringing ultimate salvation to all the people of the world."

312037.name: 旧貴族の仮面
312037.desc: "In that golden age, the nobles shared with the people their knowledge and profits.\nBut the later nobles were seduced by power. Their banquets were exclusively for their own pleasure."

312038.name: 遂げられなかった想い
312038.desc: "Do not break faith with the eyes of those still willing to gaze upon the burning flames."

312039.name: 諧律奇想の断章
312039.desc: "If I truly did have a chance to choose, then I would be able to change the unchangeable end of which you spoke."

312040.name: 悪龍の片眼鏡
312040.desc: "I will surely return to save all souls. Ten years, even a hundred years may pass, but I shall be reborn as a new universe."

312041.name: 旧貴族のしつけ
312041.desc: "They were noble not only in lineage, but also in their commitment to virtues and principles.\nThe longevity of the nobles was cut short by their endless self-indulgence. Ostentation gave way to devolution."

312043.name: 水仙の夢
312043.desc: "And just as how some people treasure withered flowers, some still reminisce endlessly over the afternoon adventures that have yet to continue..."

312044.name: 染められし羽兜
312044.desc: "That ghostly blue wildfire of which ancient legends spoke would burn brightly anew on fresh fields of battle..."

312045.name: 剣闘士のフィナーレ
312045.desc: "The gladiator's healing wounds were covered with invisible feathers.\nHe eventually set off on a journey, finally as free as a bird. His destination was the place where flowers bloom and birds soar."

312101.name: 氷雪を踏む音
312101.desc: "Past the ice-sealed door, walking down the corridors to the depths, he will break off a branch of silver-white, and bring hope to the snowy land."

312102.name: 氷風を彷徨う勇士
312102.desc: "...Then please, live on. Do not accompany us unto our doom — to languish forgotten in the snow."

312201.name: 酒に漬けた帽子
312201.desc: "The wine-sodden sea hat was thrust by a storm into the sky, and then carried away on the roiling waves, while those fated to lose their homelands engaged in battles bereft of hope and want."

312202.name: 沈淪の心
312202.desc: "For all deaths are in vain. There is no saving those who indulge in the past."

312301.name: 焦げた魔女の帽子
312301.desc: "...You ashes who dance so wildly, answer me — why have you taken all that I love?"

312302.name: 燃え盛る炎の魔女
312302.desc: "I will sing no elegies. I refuse laments. I shall not sigh. I have no use for pointless noise.\nIf justice is long dead, then to whom can I offer redemption?"

312401.name: 雷を呼ぶ冠
312401.desc: "The song pierced the storm's low hum, ripped through the clouds, and bestowed upon it, light."

312402.name: 雷のような怒り
312402.desc: "Then I shall sing you another tune — when you come again with thunder and rain!"

312501.name: 緑の狩人の冠
312501.desc: "None could ever bestow a crown upon the queen of hunters, for only earth and heaven were higher than she."

312502.name: 翠緑の影
312502.desc: "One day, in those boundless hunting grounds... we will meet again."

312601.name: 不動玄石の相
312601.desc: "He knew right from wrong, and he never missed his mark."

312602.name: 悠久の磐岩
312602.desc: "While the Millelith stands guard, evil shall never prevail!"

312701.name: 月桂の宝冠
312701.desc: "There is a time appointed for all things to live and die, and the cycle continues on forever."

312702.name: 深林の記憶
312702.desc: "For all those who follow nature must pass through the maze of the forest and reach that endless plain."

313001.name: 狩猟刀エイ亜種
313001.desc: Among the Fontemer Aberrants, there are certain strange "Xenochromatic" lifeforms. It is said that these are not actually living creatures, but rather spirits from the ocean that have neither taken physical form nor swallowed bait. They are said to bestow blessings upon those accepted by the Fontemer as well as those that are able to control it.\nThe Xenochromatic Hunter's Ray's Ability allows the wielder to release Fontemer Water Blades that are long and sharp.

313002.name: ユムカ竜
313002.desc: Yumkasaurs are extremely skilled at latching onto heavy objects, then pulling themselves forward to move with great rapidity. They're also a great way to retrieve items from afar...

313003.name: コホラ竜
313003.desc: Only the Koholasaurs — and some adults from the People of the Springs who have mastered a variety of different skills — are able to use the Spiritways with unfettered facility, swiftly traversing these pathways of constantly flowing phlogiston...

313004.name: テペトル竜
313004.desc: "Tepetlisaurs are skilled diggers, and as they tunnel through the earth, they occasionally uncover buried treasures..."

313005.name: イクトミ竜
313005.desc: "According to legend, their ancestors did not have a physical form, and instead could drift like spirits between reality and the spiritual realm..."

313006.name: クク竜
313006.desc: It is said that the ancestors of the Qucusaurs were the closest in form to the mighty winged dragons, and that they could soar through the sky like clouds.

313007.name: ウェーブボート
313007.desc: A mysterious waterborne vehicle equipped with a magical weapon. With its deck beneath your feet, there is no waterway you cannot effortlessly traverse.

313008.name: ライノ竜
313008.desc: To a charging Tatankasaurus, solid Pulverite is no more imposing an obstacle than gently wafting steam, while the surfaces of water and liquid Phlogiston alike are as stable and supportive as a road.

313009.name: キュイッ！キュイッ！
313009.desc: "Get ready to meet your best travel companion in Natlan! Ahem, make that second best..."

313010.name: プクプク獣
313010.desc: "A type of mammal that resides in the watery regions of Fontaine. It communicates with its companions through melodious sounds."

321001.name: 璃月港口
321001.desc: "Nature provides, the mountains rejoice, we are blessed by heaven's good grace."

321002.name: 騎士団図書館
321002.desc: "Most of the books here can be lent out, but do bear in mind that you will have to return them... on time."

321003.name: 群玉閣
321003.desc: "They say that it contains a thousand dazzling jewels."

321004.name: アカツキワイナリー
321004.desc: "The best wine will always be brewed next year."

321005.name: 望舒旅館
321005.desc: "Folk stories also have it that even ones as august as the adepti sometimes bask in the moonlight here."

321006.name: 西風大聖堂
321006.desc: "If you speak sincerely into the wind, your words will surely reach the archon's ear one day."

321007.name: 天守閣
321007.desc: "What matters is that I tread the path of eternity on my people's behalf."

321008.name: 鳴神大社
321008.desc: "May Mt. Yougou flourish eternal, and may its glory be everlasting."

321009.name: 珊瑚宮
321009.desc: "Sangonomiya was once an ocean abyss, until the Great Serpent came, forming a vortex with its spiral movements, and fashioning the coral into an island."

321010.name: スメールシティ
321010.desc: Under the luxuriant Divine Tree, the sages of the academy city have accumulated all the knowledge there is to be gathered.

321011.name: ヴァナラーナ
321011.desc: "Enter the memories of the trees in the forest, descend into seedbeds sprouting the dreams of slumbering leaves, and dive into a world free of woes."

321012.name: 鎮守の森
321012.desc: Legend has it that this sacred forest was once home to many demons.

321013.name: 黄金屋
321013.desc: All the contracts that circulate throughout the land are forged here.

321014.name: ガンダルヴァー村
321014.desc: The place where travelers and Forest Rangers meet in joy — the village that listens to the heartbeat of the rainforest.

321015.name: 風龍廃墟
321015.desc: The ambitious dream was built proudly upon the capital of the God of Storms, and collapsed to ruin under the lofty song of freedom.

321016.name: 湖中のウィーピングウィロー
321016.desc: In ancient times, the weeping willow of the lake was an object of reverence. All the water veins converge upon Erinnyes and the weeping willow flourishes or withers when the waters are sweet or bitter.

321017.name: エピクレシス歌劇場
321017.desc: The true and the fantastical, the comedic and tragic find a stage here equally. Perhaps it truly is as an ancient Fontainian playwright once said — "All the world's a stage, and all of us merely players."

321018.name: メロピデ要塞
321018.desc: "A fastness of bronze and iron will collapse one day, but a city of law and justice will never fall."

321019.name: セイライ島
321019.desc: "The great battle where the sea and sky changed color have become lost to time, but the vast storms that were called upon at this time still remain."

321020.name: キングデシェレトの霊廟
321020.desc: "The huge cone is like a supporting pillar between the high sky and the yellow sands that has stood in the middle of the desert since time immemorial. Standing in front of it, be you a commoner, a wealthy man, or a well-informed researcher, you shall feel that you are but a few grains of sand all the same."

321021.name: 中央実験室跡地
321021.desc: ...When excess intelligence and passion came together, research brought about results in a manner that surpassed everyone's expectations. Now, however, there remains no one to applaud that achievement.\nWhen an ideal is destroyed, its most important responsibility is to hold its peace...

321023.name: テペトルの舞台
321023.desc: "Get up on stage, and dance, dance, dance! Become a member of the Drillbit Dance! Show us your courage and resolve, and you can also become a legend of the stage!"

321024.name: 「懸木の民」
321024.desc: "Legend has it that the warriors of the Scions of the Canopy, along with one hundred Yumkasaurs, spent a hundred days and a hundred ropes moving the 'Obsidian Totem Pole,' the symbol of their faith, to its current location."

321025.name: 「流泉の衆」
321025.desc: Natlan's best vacation destination, and a happy home for the Koholasaurus and hot spring enthusiasts!

321026.name: 「花翼の集」
321026.desc: A tribe of Qucusaur Riders — swift and aloof — who venerate the Wayob who dictate the flow of heat and scorching winds...\nEvery day, members of the tribe fly with the Qucusaurs, patrolling their territory from the air.

321027.name: 「謎煙の主」
321027.desc: A tribe renowned for its mastery of the arcane arts. It is said that in their domain, one can listen to the echoes of the silent kingdom of the night.

321028.name: 「豊穣の邦」
321028.desc: A tribe that prizes strength and muscular physiques, it's said that nearly every member regularly works out.

321029.name: インク酒場
321029.desc: "Well, if you're offering... Paimon will take a glass of Bulle Fruit Tonic! ...Um, but hold the Tonic, hehe!"

321030.name: オルビット城
321030.desc: "The heroes gazed upon the skies of gray, and in carriages bright they went their way."

321031.name: 冒険者協会
321031.desc: They boldly venture "up to the stars, down to the abyss," or so their motto would have you believe. In truth, they take on jobs ranging from finding kittens to exploring domains. Well, you cannot afford to gaze at the stars or the abyss without an honest job.

321035.name: 銀月の庭
321035.desc: And still the moonlight flows as ever.

321036.name: 潮印石
321036.desc: "The night sky has been devoured by deathly silence. We knead blood and bone for fuel, and so proclaim: The Long Night flows dark and deep. With these lanterns we wield, no specter shall stir from their sleep. By the lunar spirits, this pact is sealed."

321037.name: 霜月の里
321037.desc: Here, the Frostmoon Scions gather, listening to the teachings of moonlight.

321038.name: ナシャタウン
321038.desc: This town sits like a ship run aground on the world's edge — a place where drifters gather to scavenge fragments of elysium from the wreckage of history and fabricated pasts.

321039.name: クーヴァキ実験設計局
321039.desc: This leviathan forged of white iron and black steel hungrily devours all in its sight – energy, blood, and tears alike. Yet what it seeks is not plunder, but power enough to withstand the looming calamity.

322001.name: パイモン
322001.desc: "That's right! Your fortune is Paimon's fortune! And vice versa, Paimon's fortune is also your fortune."

322002.name: キャサリン
322002.desc: "Ad astra abyssosque! Welcome to the Adventurers' Guild."

322003.name: ティマイオス
322003.desc: "Hello there... Oh, you'd like to use the Crafting Bench? Sure, be my guest."

322004.name: ワーグナー
322004.desc: "Smithing is not dependent on brute strength. You need the sweat on your brow from constant hard work, and perseverance stronger than the metals we forge!"

322005.name: 卯師匠
322005.desc: "We just concern ourselves with making the most delicious food imaginable using everyday ingredients, universally loved flavors, and truly excellent cooking."

322006.name: マル
322006.desc: "Steeping a pot of tea, watching over the abode, accompanying the Traveler and Paimon to await the arrival of Ping and the others, watching the cloud-filled sky. These days of not having to concern myself with matters of adeptal import truly are ones of leisure..."\n"Oh! Oh dear, I must have fallen asleep again. It's a good thing that no one noticed..."

322007.name: ティミー
322007.desc: "Will pigeons that have flown away come back?"

322008.name: 立本
322008.desc: Big things are about to happen, big things! Oh, and I have an excellent business proposition for you, so, if I could just have a moment of your time?

322009.name: 常九
322009.desc: "He who has not known poverty has yet to become a true man, and at least this man has books to keep him company!"

322010.name: エリン
322010.desc: "I've got to hone my spirit and strength both if my sword arm is to be as steady as Master Jean's!"

322011.name: 田饒舌
322011.desc: "Listen, I'll tell you how is it... Let me show you real storytelling tradition!"

322012.name: 劉蘇
322012.desc: "Well then, dear guests, what would you all like to hear next?"

322013.name: 花散里
322013.desc: "When shall we meet again after this parting? For life is like the morning dew."

322014.name: 鯨井坊や
322014.desc: "When you hide a Temari, you have to hide it within the time of a Temari song. The person who is looking for it will also find it within a song's time. That will make the game fair!"

322015.name: 旭東
322015.desc: "Hmm? A problem. Agh. We can deal with it after we finish eating."

322016.name: ドニアザード
322016.desc: "The point of living is to not leave behind any regrets."

322017.name: ラナ
322017.desc: "We still have a lot of time with each other. We can explore the vastness of the forest, the world, and the future together."

322018.name: 章
322018.desc: Much burning frustration must transpire before a hunk of metal may become a keen blade.

322019.name: セタレ
322019.desc: A genius from the desert, deep within the rainforest's temple...

322020.name: 弥生七月
322020.desc: "If my skill can reach that apex, I am sure that my lacquerware will bear out the pattern of the truth..."

322021.name: マメール
322021.desc: A Melusine that paints every day. \n"Because painting the things that I want to brings me happiness!"

322022.name: ジェイド
322022.desc: "Here's a thousand hugs! We will meet again!"\n"May we meet again under a lovelier sun."

322023.name: シルヴァとマルシラック
322023.desc: "Don't be afraid. We will protect you to the very end."

322024.name: 太郎丸
322024.desc: The boss of Komore Teahouse, with whom all staff members are said to have signed a "contract"...\nFew people know that back in the day, Taroumaru would accompany powerful ninja of the Shuumatsuban, striving in service of the Yashiro Commission...

322025.name: 白手袋と漁師
322025.desc: "Amongst us, there is our own justice."

322027.name: セレーネ
322027.desc: "We're going to solve everyone's troubles today, too!"

322028.name: アテア
322028.desc: A tribal warrior known as the "Candlekeeper," the pride of the People of the Springs.

322029.name: 森の祝福
322029.desc: "I bestow upon you the blessings of the forest, and offer you a home in this land..."

322030.name: 預言の女神の贈り物
322030.desc: "When that time comes, I shall dance, and return the tracks beneath my people's feet back to the stars in the sky..."

322031.name: セイモア
322031.desc: "Welcome back, milady. You are as gentle, lovely, and radiant as ever."

322032.name: ポーナと「ココウィク」
322032.desc: "For starters, one needs enough curiosity, a thirst for knowledge, and a sense of responsibility to help others.\nBut most importantly, you need the courage to take that first step! Once you make the decision and start on a journey, you've become an adventurer."

322033.name: レピーヌ・ポーリーン
322033.desc: "I'm begging you! Begging you like the beggiest beggar in all of begdom!"

322034.name: ニェドチカ
322034.desc: "Just as the oppressive, greedy governor here stole treasures from the Frostmoon Scions all those years ago, the Fatui now have seized things that don't belong to them.\nI must retrieve the Proof of the Cognoscenti from them and find Reed Miller's Great Treasure, so that his name, now forgotten, will be held in esteem once more throughout the world!"

323001.name: 参量物質変化器
323001.desc: "Simply put, everything on this earth and below it has cycles. Memories and elements surge throughout the Ley Lines."\n"Perhaps the ancient civilizations were attempting to uncover the cycle that governs the conversion of dust to treasure."

323002.name: 携帯式栄養袋
323002.desc: "Regular nutrition helps in case of physical exertion."

323003.name: 赤羽団扇
323003.desc: Legend has it that this fan is capable of unleashing various effects in the hands of a tengu warrior.\nBut in the hands of an ordinary person, it only possesses the power to "make one's body lighter."\nEven so, this degree of power is more than useful for the average individual.

323004.name: 宝探し仙霊
323004.desc: Strange Seelie capable of guiding people toward treasure. Legend has it that some individuals know how to communicate with these Seelie...

323005.name: 種の匣
323005.desc: A special container obtained from Madame Ping. According to her, this dispensary has the power to "generate seeds"...

323006.name: 追憶のレンズ
323006.desc: They say that in the distant past, the legendary Kitsune Saiguu left a catalyst for the then-Hiiragi Clan head, Hiroshi, as a tool to be used in exorcisms.\nThe Hiiragis would have a special Kamera made to order from overseas with that catalyst mounted on its lens assembly, before giving it back to the Grand Narukami Shrine as a symbol of their friendship.

323007.name: 流明石の触媒
323007.desc: "May it be as a sun in your palm, lighting the way through the lightless tunnels and bringing comfort where all is dark."

323008.name: クサヴァ
323008.desc:
Kusava, Kusava~♪
Memories and dreams are full of power.
It is the fruit of flowering plants, and also the seed of new life.
They are the temporary dwelling place of Aranara memories, and they give Aranara strength.

330001.name: 旧時の庭園
330001.desc: "Is mortal life not an empty shell, as unto a dream?"

330002.name: 磐岩の誓約
330002.desc: "Rex Lapis bestowed him with a pair of eyes to see the world, and came to an agreement with him. The dragon then accompanied the Lord of Geo, fighting campaigns alongside him in the four corners of the world..."

330004.name: 自由の新風
330004.desc: "The heavenly bard brushed the strings of the lyre, summoning forth the gale, dispersing the ice and snow, cleaving the peaks, and making the new Mondstadt the home of freedom."

330005.name: 万戸の竈
330005.desc: "The Stove God cared for the people, turning himself into minions who went into every home, fostering food and solidarity alike."

330006.name: 裁定の時
330006.desc: "It is time to make the final decision on this case."

330007.name: 抗争の日·夢砕ける時
330007.desc: Victorious were we who fought to be free... Thus did the dream of eternal prosperity fall with this mighty capital...

330008.name: 往日の激戦
330008.desc: The god whom the people of Watatsumi Island once trusted fought a bitter battle against the ruler of Narukami...\nMusoujin Gorge, that yawning chasm in Yashiori Island, is the lasting scar of that conflict...

330009.name: 赦免の宣告
330009.desc: "Every last Fontainian is guilty, with judgment and doom certain to one day fall upon them — this is neither metaphor nor rhetoric."

330010.name: 帰火聖夜の巡礼
330010.desc: "Every participant, whether they win or lose, contributes to the defense of our nation. That's what makes it such an honor to take part."

330011.name: 「死」のための戦い
330011.desc: "No hero should have to wander alone."

330012.name: 「砂中の遺事」
330012.desc: "Children of the desert, cling no longer to past grievances. But hold tight to the memory of this act of benevolence..."

330013.name: 向こう側の霜月
330013.desc: "We are all tainted by sin... How could we ever hope to behold the moonlight in its purest form?"

331004.name: 元素変幻・超電導の祝福
331004.desc: The thunder borrows the might of ice, piercing clouds and splitting rocks.

331005.name: 元素変幻・蒸発の祝福
331005.desc: When water and fire meet in concord, no venture shall fail.

331006.name: 元素変幻・開花の祝福
331006.desc: Nurtured by rain and soil, life thrives in endless bloom.

331007.name: 元素変幻・炎と岩の祝福
331007.desc: Forged of fire and stone, might stands unyielding and eternal.

331008.name: 元素変幻・氷と草の祝福JP0L
331008.desc: As rime seals the land and the grasses fall still, all sounds are hushed.

331009.name: 元素変幻・雷と風の祝福JP0L
331009.desc: Wind and thunder surge, swift and unrelenting.

331101.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の氷
331101.desc: Even the sky shall shiver before the ice.

331102.name: 元素共鳴：粉砕の氷
331102.desc: The frost flower blooms as a heart undivided.

331201.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の水
331201.desc: The dance of water nourishes life.

331301.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の炎
331301.desc: The scarlet flame reduces the vanquished to dust.

331302.name: 元素共鳴：熱誠の炎
331302.desc: A burning heart may match the sun and moon.

331401.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の雷
331401.desc: Lightning falls on the land of eternity.

331501.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の風
331501.desc: The wind sings like a leisurely lyre.

331502.name: 元素共鳴：迅速の風
331502.desc: The gale gallops through the woods.

331601.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の岩
331601.desc: The jagged mountains sign a lasting pact.

331602.name: 元素共鳴：不動の岩
331602.desc: Bedrock shall make the hills unshakable.

331701.name: 元素共鳴：交錯の草
331701.desc: All shall dance in the dream forest.

331702.name: 元素共鳴：蔓生の草
331702.desc: New branches and sprouts grow into a forest.

331721.name: 月兆・満照
331721.desc: "Come night or day, may the moonlight connect us."

331801.name: 風と自由
331801.desc: "Someday, the winds will blow towards a brighter future."

331802.name: 岩と契約
331802.desc: "This is the trust I have placed in them. Betray it, and you taint my blood."

331803.name: 雷と永遠
331803.desc: "It once promised its people a dream: the never-changing 'eternity.'"

331804.name: 草と知恵
331804.desc: "That dancing circle embodied everything about the universe. Life has always been the end, while it is wisdom that shall be the means."

331805.name: 水と正義
331805.desc: "'Existence' was Egeria's justice... and to me, justice is the 'continuation' of that existence."

331806.name: 炎と戦争
331806.desc: "We are the inheritors of memory and legend. Those who grew alongside sun and wind. Those who forged our own destiny and future. That is Natlan's fire, the lifeblood of our nation."

331807.name: 月と故郷
331807.desc:
"My moon, my beloved song,
abandon me not in this dark night.
My little doves, bring from that golden city
the song of my homeland."

332001.name: 最高の仲間！
332001.desc: "You might be only one of countless stars, but you're Paimon's whole world!"

332002.name: シフト交代の時間
332002.desc: "It's time for the adults to get to work, and for the kids to get some sleep."

332003.name: 乾坤一擲
332003.desc: Before the dice are thrown, none can know their own destiny.

332004.name: 権謀術数
332004.desc: "This might look quite complicated, but in truth, the possible scenarios do not exceed 187 in number."

332005.name: 俺様はまだ負けちゃいねぇ！
332005.desc: Arataki "He Might Lose but He'll Never Admit Defeatto" is always game for another round!

332006.name: お任せください！
332006.desc: "It's fine, leave everything to me!" — This ranks first among "lines to put Mondstadter hearts at ease."

332007.name: 鶴の帰郷
332007.desc: "The crane once returned, and once, she was spurned, she turned, and left alone; now, she might be found, with friends all around, to whom she is bound — a home."

332008.name: 星天の兆
332008.desc: "This is destiny, and it cannot be defied."

332009.name: 白亜の術
332009.desc: "Not to worry. The experiment has been completed, and it is — if I may say so — a great success."

332010.name: 武芸マスター
332010.desc: "Watch and learn, comrade! A real warrior isn't picky about their weapons!"

332011.name: 神宝遷宮祝詞
332011.desc: "Hehe... Well now, isn't this finally getting interesting?"

332012.name: 迅速裁縫の術
332012.desc: 'Tis the secret to Baron Bunny the 893rd's longevity.

332013.name: 送ってあげよ～！
332013.desc: "Here at Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, you can count on us to go full send! Satisfaction guaranteed!"

332014.name: 護法の誓い
332014.desc: "Adeptus Xiao. I will be here when you call."

332016.name: ファデュイの悪巧み
332016.desc: ...But none know the intricacies of what they are plotting.

332017.name: 落下斬り
332017.desc: "...Don't deploy your Wind Glider halfway down! You'll get discovered!"

332018.name: 重攻撃
332018.desc: For those that aren't so strong...\nIt's best to regard the "The Shatterstone Method" as just a "metaphor."

332019.name: ヴァネッサの物語
332019.desc: "Lonely forest breezes converged, jointly they overthrew the tyrant's tower from the sky."\n"Broken free from shackles at last, the young lioness stood firm in the winds with her head held high."

332020.name: 永遠なる友情
332020.desc: Good friends never truly leave. They stay with us in another form.

332021.name: 大夢のメロディー
332021.desc: "Enter our dreams, our world."\n"Write of deeds good, brave, and honest."

332022.name: 剣はいずこ
332022.desc: The origins of this Branch Master of the Adventurers' Guild are shrouded in mystery, yet she keeps looking for clues about the sword, constantly challenging powerful enemies along the way...

332023.name: 鉄拳闘技！
332023.desc: "For victory, Credit Coupons, and the hottest goods in the Rag and Bone Shop... and the freedom that may come someday, strike!"

332024.name: 琴音の詩
332024.desc: "The traditions of song and poetry, flowing onward in clear, moving melodies."

332025.name: イノシシプリンセス
332025.desc: In ancient legends, the Boar Kingdom was prosperous and filled with joy. The young princess of the Kingdom took the wise Fox and long-lived Tortoise, and set out on the road to the north, hoping to turn the little wolf back into that good child...

332026.name: 崩落ときっかけ
332026.desc: The accident of falling into a pit can also be a chance to reveal the buried past beneath the dust.

332027.name: きらめくクローバーマーク
332027.desc: A wondrous symbol shaped like a four-leaf clover, it is of great assistance to one who manipulates the elements.

332028.name: マシナリーの生産ライン
332028.desc: Countless widgets, heated and forged, eventually go into making these exceptional machines, and to the inmates of the Fortress of Meropide, they mean valuable Credit Coupons...

332029.name: シューニャター花
332029.desc: "This vibrant color is the miracle of life's flowing springs."\n"Abide with me, sing and caper with me, and let us weave eternal joy"...

332030.name: 可制御性無害化型指向性爆発
332030.desc: "...haven't hidden anything. All the Arkhium has been handled appropriately. This explosion was always a 'controllable hazard removal directional blast.'"

332031.name: 海中の宝探し
332031.desc: Beryl Conches, Lumitoiles, and the occasional treasure chest hidden within a shell...

332032.name: トリックカウントダウン：3
332032.desc: "Would you like to see a magic trick? Now then, count down with me — three... two... one!"

332036.name: 「あいつらが金を稼ぐことは…」

332039.name: 竜の仲間たちの食事
332039.desc: "...Last but not least: Get 'em some good grub! The way to a Saurian's heart is through the stomach, after all!"

332040.name: エルマイト旅団のティータイム
332040.desc: "Join the Eremites and Embrace a Wonderful New Life!"

332041.name: 最強サーフィンコンビ！
332041.desc: "Just find yourself a good swell, pick up a suitable surfboard, and you too can experience the joys of surfing whenever you want!"

332042.name: 燃素満タン
332042.desc: A special high-temperature thermal energy that can be found throughout Natlan. It comes in all shapes and sizes, and has many wondrous uses...\nAfter Nightsoul points are fully depleted, warriors will switch to consuming Phlogiston to maintain their Nightsoul's Blessing.

332043.name: テペトル仔竜！お宝発見！

332044.name: 極限の名の下に
332044.desc: "Relax your body and embrace the storm! Together with your companions, chase the tailwinds of extremity."

332045.name: むにゃむにゃ瞑想術
332045.desc: "What is the nature of meditation... Hey! Whatever it is, it sure as heck isn't sleeping!"

332046.name: 飛行隊出撃！
332046.desc: "Back when the Flower-Feather Clan was responsible for patrolling and defending all of Natlan, the flying squad was the best of the best — the fiercest warriors in the nation."

332048.name: トレーニングの成果
332048.desc: "I keep telling them it's down to the training... Why doesn't anybody listen?"

332049.name: 収穫期
332049.desc: "Very good. Exactly like that. Keep it up."

332050.name: いいぞ、きょうだい。
332050.desc: "Alright, come here, sit still, open up, and say 'ah'!"

332051.name: 「悪龍」の目覚め
332051.desc: "It came down from the skies in an ominous black mist and ravaged our homeland..."

332052.name: ナレーションの補足
332052.desc: "Suspect, try and look more serious. Heroes, more natural please, happy smiles! ...But no smiling from the victim or their friends and family, thank you. No, no, don't get up! Stay on the ground, we need to capture the crime scene as-is!"

332053.name: 砕けた海
332053.desc: "We surge through different bushes and shrubs like a gust of wind, like rivers passing through another lake... We encounter different things, and we, too, become different people."

332054.name: 「魔女Mからの祝福」
332054.desc: "Go forth and witness this world, my child... Make sure to be nice to everyone...\nYou'll meet good friends one day, I'm sure of it... That is my wish for your future."

332056.name: 往昔に祀瓏有り、霊錦の誠を歆ける
332056.desc: "Have you noticed them, seen them? The children who wash their little feet in the streams, fishermen laughing beneath the light of the rainbow's arc, the moonlight trysts of lovebirds, their figures painted silver... Humans, too, are creatures of this land. Just how different is their innocence from ours?"

332057.name: 水仙十字大冒険
332057.desc: "Before you arrived, I had a dream. I dreamed that I was a small, brave Oceanid, and we set out to save the Princess..."

332058.name: 世界を救う計画
332058.desc: "I refuse. The world is not as weak as you think."

332059.name: 「朝霧を越えた冒険」
332059.desc: "...I won't let you get it! Because we're going to stop your plan, right here!"

332060.name: 天才的な改造
332060.desc: "Alright, upgrade complete! Time to treat myself to a tasty snack."

332062.name: お掃除の時間
332062.desc: "Cleanup sequence in progress... Based on data from past incidents, please avoid dropping small items such as: Mora, screws, gears, minerals, toys, gummies, snacks, hairbands, socks, and slippers."

333001.name: 絶雲のお焦げ
333001.desc: Flavorful and crispy Jueyun Guoba — with Guoba's stamp of approval.

333002.name: 仙跳牆
333002.desc: It is said that this name was derived from this dish's ability to tempt an adeptus to return to the mortal realm. But that begs the question... Which adeptus was that?

333003.name: ハスの花パイ
333003.desc: Dough is formed into bud-like shapes and placed into a pot of oil as if upon the surface of a lake, causing them to slowly bloom layer by layer... A pleasing sight indeed.

333004.name: 北地のスモークチキン
333004.desc: This dish makes for a warm welcome for guests who come to the northern regions. Now, what manner of guests shall be "treated" to this hospitality this time?

333005.name: 鳥肉のスイートフラワー漬け焼き
333005.desc: Perhaps some have never seen a chicken run... But there's no one who hasn't tried a Sweet Madame!

333006.name: モンド風ハッシュドポテト
333006.desc: The sweet taste verifies the famous words of a certain famous gourmet known throughout Teyvat — a dish that may be called a regional specialty cannot taste bad.

333007.name: キノコピザ
333007.desc: They say that a researcher once used very precise calculations to uncover the "fairest way to cut pizza," but as the process is far too bothersome, basically no one uses it...

333008.name: ミントの獣肉巻き
333008.desc: Though this might be its current form, think about it for a moment: did this dish first start as mint rolled around meat, or meat rolled around mint?

333009.name: テイワット風目玉焼き
333009.desc: With a taste of the summer sun, it invigorates you from the first bite.\nTake care to eat this meal slowly, and avoid choking the throat of destiny when impelled by the fullness of life's vitality.

333010.name: 刺身の盛り合わせ
333010.desc: Under the blade of a master chef, the texture of the ingredients remains pristine. Upon consumption, it is as if something living is leaping inside your mouth...\nHold on, could these ingredients still be...

333011.name: タンドリーチキン
333011.desc: The chicken and spices are capable of performing a mysterious Sumeru dance on the tip of your tongue, evoking the image of a festive banquet...\nBut even a dish so delicious has its last bite, and every feast has its end.

333012.name: カニのバター添え
333012.desc: The butter-infused crab legs have a rich aroma that washes over the taste buds so seductively that none can resist its allure.\n"Another helping, please!"

333013.name: フィッシュアンドチップス
333013.desc: Fish fried until golden and crispy, with chips and a smorgasbord of sauces. Every single bite is suffused with savory satisfaction...

333014.name: 松茸の肉巻き
333014.desc: Ground meat is put on the Matsutake and gently pan-fried on low heat so the Matsutake can fully take in the aromatic juice of the meat. It's a mouthwatering delicacy in all of its glory.

333015.name: カラフルマカロン
333015.desc: Small, multicolored little pastries. Their crispy outer shell packages a sweet, soft center, each refined to perfection.\nThere is a saying in Fontaine that "a dessert spread without macarons is like having the many waters bereft of their source."

333016.name: ちび竜ビスケット
333016.desc: Crackers shaped like little Saurians. Light, crispy, sweet, and fragrant, with adorable patterns on top to boot — how could the people of Natlan not be won over by such delectable snacks?

333017.name: きらきらジュエリー
333017.desc: Multicolored biscuits. The sour and sweet jam gives off the clear luster of crystalline form, adding a shine to the crunchy treats. Such radiance! Such tastiness! What could this be but equal even to the most precious jewels?

333018.name: ドキドキポンポン
333018.desc: A snack with lots of different flavors. If you close your eyes, you won't be able to guess what flavor you'll get next, and eating them is sure to increase your heart rate. The "pop" part of the name comes from the sound of Grainfruit kernels bursting open under high temperatures.

333019.name: 温泉タイム
333019.desc: A pizza made using Grainfruit. Grainfruit is scattered across the crust before a thick layer of cheese is poured on top, and the whole thing is delivered into the oven. The final touch is to then draw a little Koholasaurus picture on it. Eat it while it's hot — the warmth will remind you of a serene time spent enjoying a soothing soak in a hot spring.

333020.name: ミステリードリンク
333020.desc: A drink made from Grainfruit. Originally invented as a type of medicine by a certain shaman of the Masters of the Night-Wind, the recipe has been altered with the passage of time and is now a common drink at social gatherings.

333027.name: 高らかな歌声
333027.desc: A cool-flavored throat lozenge. Said to be the Flower-Feather Clan's secret weapon for soothing their throats and protecting their vocal cords — so eat one and go sing your heart out! Just make sure you don't go overboard, as too much sugar can leave your throat feeling hoarse.

333028.name: ハーベスト・ブーン
333028.desc: A rich and comforting meal held together by the humble Grainfruit. Minced meat is stir-fried and placed in a baking pan with larger chunks of meat and eggs. The whole thing is then covered with a layer of mashed Grainfruit and baked until a tantalizing golden brown. This hearty dish can often be found on the tables of the Collective of Plenty during harvest festivals.

333029.name: 沈玉茶
333029.desc: Your initial sip brings forth flavor on an elegant light breeze, the sweet fragrances of Chenyu Vale alighting upon your lips and tongue. Hark — is that the sweet tinkling of the mountain springs singing in your ear?

333030.name: ルーレットカクテル
333030.desc: Colorful drinks. It might be more accurate to call this a table game than nourishment of any sort, one where the rules are to drink whatever drink the pointer falls on.
